Global Variable# SLServiceTypeTencentWeibo

iOS 6.0–11.0DeprecatediPadOS 6.0–11.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.8–10.13Deprecated

```
let SLServiceTypeTencentWeibo: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/social/slservicetypetencentweibo#Discussion)

A string constant that identifies the social networking site, Tencent Weibo.
